zh.Worcester, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特
zh.Saltash, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾薩爾塔申
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agenta Maynard於1434年5月10日出生在英國可瓦爾薩爾塔申時，她的父親Sir Richard Maynard II41歲，母親Lady Isabel Cotgreave40歲。她於大約1429年與Richard DeEarth Bond在英國可瓦爾薩爾塔申結婚。他們至少是9個兒子的父母。她去世在英國可瓦爾。

zh-hans.Worcester, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特
zh-hans.Saltash, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾薩爾塔申
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agenta Maynard于1434年5月10日出生在英国可瓦爾薩爾塔申时，她的父亲Sir Richard Maynard II41岁，母亲Lady Isabel Cotgreave40岁。她于大约1429年与Richard DeEarth Bond在英国可瓦爾薩爾塔申结婚。他们至少是9个儿子的父母。她去世在英国可瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Maynard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Mainard (from ancient Germanic Maganhard, Meginard, from magin- ‘power, might’ + hard- ‘brave, hardy’). Compare Mainard .
Altered form of French Ménard (see Menard ), a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Minardi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Carmine, Sal, Salvatore, Silvio, Corrado, Emanuele, Gino, Giorgio, Luciano, Natale.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a personal name, Minardo, equivalent to Maynard .

variants.name: Minard
meanings: French: variant of Ménard (see Menard ), a cognate of Maynard .

variants.name: Minardo
meanings: Italian: from the personal name Minardo of German origin, see Maynard 1.

variants.name: Mainard
meanings: English (Hampshire and Kent) and French: variant of   Maynard  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Maino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Elida, Angelo, Mario, Rodolfo, Vito.
Italian (northern): from the ancient Germanic personal name Maino, a short form of compound names beginning with the element magin ‘strength’, such as Mainardo (see Maynard 1).

nameMeanings.name: Agenta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian: habitational name from Argenta in Emilia-Romagna.

variants.name: Argento
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Antonio, Calogero, Giuseppe, Carmella, Claudio, Dino, Filippo, Mario, Natale, Paolo, Pasquale, Renato, Rocco.
from argento ‘silver’, perhaps sometimes applied as a nickname for someone with silvery gray hair, but more often a metonymic occupational name for a silversmith.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agenta Maynard was born on 10 May 1434, in Saltash, Cornwall, England, her father, Sir Richard Maynard II, was 41 and her mother, Lady Isabel Cotgreave, was 40. She married Richard DeEarth Bond about 1429, in Saltash, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons. She died in Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agenta Maynard est née le 10 mai 1434, à Saltash, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Maynard II, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabel Cotgreave, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Richard DeEarth Bond environ 1429, à Saltash, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils. Elle est décédée à Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agenta Maynard am 10. Mai 1434 in Saltash, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Maynard II 41 und ihre Mutter Lady Isabel Cotgreave 40. Sie hat um 1429 in Saltash, Cornwall, England Richard DeEarth Bond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne. Sie starb in Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agenta Maynard è nata il il 10 maggio 1434 nel Saltash, Cornwall, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Maynard II, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Lady Isabel Cotgreave, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Richard DeEarth Bond circa 1429, nel Saltash, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli. Morì nel Cornwall, England.

ja.Worcester, Worcestershire, England: イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスター
ja.Berkshire, England: イギリスイギリスバークシュアイア
ja.Saltash, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワルサルタッシュ
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agenta Maynardが1434年5月10日にイギリスコルンワルサルタッシュで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Maynard IIは41歳，母Lady Isabel Cotgreaveは40歳であった。約1429年にイギリスコルンワルサルタッシュでRichard DeEarth Bondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスコルンワルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agenta Maynard(이)가 1434년 5월 10일 영국 코른월 살타시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Maynard II(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabel Cotgreave(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1429년 영국 코른월 살타시에서 Richard DeEarth Bond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 코른월에서 사망했다.

mn.Saltash, Cornwall, England: Essa, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agenta Maynard nasceu em 10 de maio de 1434, em Saltash, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Maynard II, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabel Cotgreave, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard DeEarth Bond aproximadamente 1429, em Saltash, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos. Ela faleceu em Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agenta Maynard родилась 10 мая 1434 г. в местности салташ, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Maynard II было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel Cotgreave, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard DeEarth Bond около 1429 г. в местности салташ, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей. Она умерла в местности корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agenta Maynard nació el 10 de mayo de 1434, en Saltash, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Maynard II, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lady Isabel Cotgreave, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Richard DeEarth Bond aproximadamente 1429, en Saltash, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos. Murió en Cornwall, Inglaterra.
